original_snippet_context: Discussing the precarious conditions of coffee farming and the large capital of the Dumont Company, then shifts to the company's stance on coffee valorization and exchange rate fixing.
relevant_quote: A Companhia Dumont [...] ataca [...] o projecto de fixação do cambio, dizendo que «o projecto dessa remissão de papel parece conter muitos elementos de perigo e pode lançar o paiz em difficuldades mais graves do que actualmente».
justification: The Dumont Company's criticism of the "fixação do cambio" (exchange rate fixing) as dangerous, potentially worsening the country's difficulties, aligns with orthodox concerns about disrupting monetary stability.
